caption: The video captures a formal meeting or conference setting where two men, both dressed in suits and wearing lanyards, are seated at a table equipped with microphones, water bottles, and nameplates. The man on the left, identified as Masood Ahmed, is seen covering his mouth with his hand, possibly in reaction to something amusing or surprising. The man on the right appears to be speaking into the microphone, gesturing with his hand near his face, and then resting his hand on the table. Both individuals seem engaged in the discussion, with their body language suggesting active participation and attentiveness. The background features a patterned wall, adding to the professional ambiance of the event.
